description: Evolution System Features - Real-time evolution metrics, generation history, feature success tracking, mutation analysis, controller decisions, and complete transparency

userStories.title: Update EvolutionMetrics component with real API data
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see current evolution status and metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Update EvolutionMetrics to fetch from GET /evolution/metrics
Display controller decision with color-coded badge (STABLE=green, EVOLVE_CONSERVATIVE=yellow, EVOLVE_MODERATE=orange, EVOLVE_AGGRESSIVE=red)
Verify in browser that metrics display correctly
userStories.notes: Implemented API service layer with fetchEvolutionMetrics, updated useEvolutionData hook with loading/error states and auto-refresh, updated EvolutionMetrics component with skeleton, error state, and refresh button

userStories.title: Update GenerationHistoryChart with real data
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see evolution progression over time.
acceptanceCriteria: Update GenerationHistoryChart to fetch from GET /evolution/generation-history
Display line chart with generation number on X-axis
Display fitness score on Y-axis (primary line)
Display average performance as secondary line
Show tooltips with generation details on hover
Highlight current generation with vertical line
Add date range selector (7 days, 30 days, 90 days, all)
Show fitness improvement percentage vs first generation
Use recharts or similar charting library
Verify in browser that chart displays correctly
userStories.notes: Completely rewrote GenerationHistoryChart component with all required features: generation number on X-axis, fitness and avg performance lines, tooltips with timestamps, Brush for zoom/pan, date range selector (7/30/90/all days), fitness improvement badge, auto-refresh every 10s, loading skeleton, error state with retry, empty state, and current stats section. Updated useEvolutionData hook to include loading/error states for generation history and added refetchGenerationHistory to return value. Updated all three GenerationHistoryChart instances in page.tsx with loading, error, onRefresh, and onDateRangeChange props.

userStories.title: Update FeatureSuccessAnalysis with real data
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see which features perform best.
acceptanceCriteria: Update FeatureSuccessAnalysis to fetch from GET /evolution/feature-success
Display table with feature name, success rate, total uses, wins, losses, avg P&L
Add feature detail modal on row click
Add filter by minimum uses count
Add sort by any column (click header)
Verify in browser that features display correctly
userStories.notes: Created comprehensive FeatureSuccessAnalysis component with table view displaying all required metrics (feature name, success rate, total uses, wins, losses, avg P&L). Implemented sortable columns with visual indicators, color-coded success rates with background badges, feature detail modal with full metrics, minimum uses filter, search functionality, CSV export, pagination (20 per page), auto-refresh every 30s, professional loading skeleton, and error state with retry button. Integrated with existing useEvolutionData hook and updated page.tsx to use the new component in both Analytics and Evolution sections.

userStories.title: Update MutationSuccessTracking with real data
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see which mutation strategies work best.
acceptanceCriteria: Update MutationSuccessTracking to fetch from GET /evolution/mutation-success
Display table with mutation type, success rate, total attempts, fitness improvement
Group by mutation type (ADD_FEATURE, REMOVE_FEATURE, MODIFY_WEIGHT, COMBINE_FEATURES)
Display average fitness improvement per mutation type
Add bar chart showing success rate by mutation type
Verify in browser that mutations display correctly
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented MutationSuccessTracking component with all acceptance criteria met. Created comprehensive table-based component with sortable columns (mutationType, successRate, totalAttempts, successful, avgFitnessImprovement), color-coded success rates with background badges (green >60%, yellow 30-60%, red <30%), and fitness improvement display. Added bar chart showing success rate by mutation type using recharts with color-coded bars matching success rate thresholds. Implemented minimum attempts filter with API callback integration for real-time filtering. Added export to CSV functionality with timestamped filenames. Integrated auto-refresh every 30 seconds via useEvolutionData hook with separate mutationTracking loading state to avoid UI conflicts. Created professional loading skeleton with card header, filters, chart placeholder, and table rows. Added error state with AlertCircle icon, descriptive message, and retry button. Updated useEvolutionData hook to include mutationTracking loading/error states and fetchMutationTracking function. Updated page.tsx to import and render MutationSuccessTracking in Evolution section with proper prop passing. All TypeScript types are correct - no type errors in page.tsx or MutationSuccessTracking.tsx.

userStories.title: Update ControllerDecisionTimeline with real data
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see controller decisions with reasoning.
acceptanceCriteria: Update ControllerDecisionTimeline to fetch from GET /evolution/controller-history
Display timeline with oldest to newest decisions (left to right)
Show decision type as badge with color coding
Show fitness score at time of decision
Add detail modal on click with full reasoning
Verify in browser that timeline displays correctly

userStories.title: Update EvolutionEventLog with real-time data
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see evolution events in real-time.
acceptanceCriteria: Update EvolutionEventLog to fetch from GET /evolution/logs
Color-code by event type (info=blue, mutation=purple, generation=green, warning=yellow, error=red)
Add filter by event type checkboxes
Show toast for important events (new generation, aggressive evolution)
Verify in browser that log displays correctly

userStories.title: Create EvolutionParameterControls component
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to adjust evolution parameters.
acceptanceCriteria: Add dropdown for selection strategy (roulette, tournament, rank)
Add Apply on Next Generation checkbox
Show current values vs default values
Show validation warnings for extreme values
Use RoleGuard to restrict to admin role
Use shadcn/ui Slider, Select, Button components
Verify in browser that controls work

userStories.title: Create ManualEvolutionTrigger component
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to manually trigger evolution cycles.
acceptanceCriteria: Add confirmation dialog for each action
Display cooldown timer (min 60 seconds between triggers)
Add RoleGuard to restrict to admin role
Verify in browser that trigger works

userStories.title: Create FeatureDetailModal component
userStories.description: As a user, I need detailed view of an evolved feature.
acceptanceCriteria: Display win rate by symbol (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100)
Display win rate by timeframe (M1, M5, M15, H1)
Display evolution history (when created, when last modified)
Display recent trades using this feature
Add compare to other features button
Add X button to close modal
Verify in browser that modal displays correctly
